headline: Goldman Sachs Upgrades WR Berkley to Buy, Raises Price Target to $73
summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst Robert Cox   upgrades WR Berkley (NYSE:WRB) from Neutral to Buy and raises the price target from $71 to $73.

headline: Wells Fargo Downgrades WR Berkley to Underweight, Lowers Price Target to $58
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Elyse Greenspan   downgrades WR Berkley (NYSE:WRB) from Equal-Weight to Underweight and lowers the price target from $64 to $58.
